extract: Chikorita (Japanese: チコリータ Chicorita) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Bayleef starting at level 16, which evolves into Meganium starting at level 32. Along with Cyndaquil and Totodile, Chikorita is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Johto available at the beginning of Pokémon Gold, Silver, Crystal, HeartGold, and SoulSilver. It is also one of the three first partner Pokémon of Lumiose City in Pokémon Legends: Z-A, alongside Tepig and Totodile.
